---
title: "Tree 25 - English Oak"
toc: false
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_trees_from_epicollect.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

![Tree 25 - English Oak](/assets/images/trees/tree25.jpg)

{{< include '_tree-species-info/_english-oak.md' >}}

## Tree data

**Planted:** SK: Nature Discovery Garden

**Diameter at breast height (1.3m):** 41.8cm
